_comment: Default mcp_config seeded into the Claude Code (terminator-9999) global agent at bootstrap. EnsureClaudeCodeGlobalAgent reads this file, substitutes ${VAR} tokens from process env, and writes the resolved JSON to agent.mcp_config. The placeholders below MUST stay placeholders in the repo; real values come from the deploy env. Env-var contract + rotation runbook: PKM-CUONG/GROWTH/PROJECTS/multica-fork/runbooks/2026-05-01-global-chat-v3-rollout.md.
